business_ideas.idea: The Last Mile: nonprofit teaching incarcerated people to code, job placement at tech companies
Prospero/charter cities: Peter Thiel's private charter city in Honduras for legal experimentation
Mini Circle: gene therapy company using CRISPR, relocated to Prospero to avoid FDA restrictions
Praxis: charter city project recruiting founders and early adopters to build new city

predictions.text: Charter cities will become mainstream in next 10 years as alternative to traditional governance
Charter cities and biohacker projects risky but interesting for testing radical ideas
Last Mile program graduating 1000+ people with zero recidivism vs 65% national average is proof of model
